title: milium sorghum
intro: Milium sorghum, also known as pearl millet, is a type of cereal crop belonging to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of milium sorghum include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as diabetes and heart disease, as well as aiding in digestion and weight management. Milium sorghum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and flour, which can be used to make traditional dishes and baked goods.
